initiatives.name: Be Youuu
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support for LGBTQ+ youth in Little Rock. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through youth empowerment, mental health support, and creating affirming spaces for queer and trans youth to thrive.

initiatives.name: Little Rock Freedom Fund
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective providing direct support and community care in Little Rock. They coordinate emergency assistance, resource distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through collective action and community resilience.

initiatives.name: Rock City Defense
initiatives.description: A community defense collective fostering mutual aid and solidarity through direct action and community support in Little Rock. They coordinate resource sharing, emergency assistance, and solidarity networks while building power through collective organizing and community care.

initiatives.name: It's The Van
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support in Little Rock. They coordinate direct assistance, resource distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through mobile outreach, providing essential supplies, and creating spaces for community care and support.

initiatives.name: Food Justice United of Arkansas
initiatives.description: Coordinates harm reduction programs, hosts and supports mutual aid Free Stores and resources-access programs through collaboration with food banks, community and governmental entities, extending the reach of their goals of community mutual aid and empowerment.
